---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue with HALT
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **Platform**: (Windows / macOS / Raspberry Pi / iOS / Browser)
- **HALT Version**: (e.g. 1.0.1-alpha)
- **Browser** (if applicable): (e.g. Chrome, Safari)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. If this occurred in a field environment, note any relevant conditions (network status, battery level, number of connected devices, etc.).
